creator: bcr@FreeBSD.org
text: This seems to be more like a reminder to periodically do things, rather than a concrete suggestion for a fix. The tips are helpful, but should not reside in the bug tracker, but rather be on everyones mind when adding or changing content. We do have some checkers like vale that find bugs like these during edits and many editors also provide this by default. Link checks are a separate issue, but a link checker would likely find these, too. When things are found to be wrong or not working as expected, users will report them as separate PRs. No need to keep this one open as an eternal reminder that does not see any progress over time. Hence, PR closed.
